subject: New device login detected — Mentora
title: New device login detected
intro: Hi{{namePart}}, we noticed a login to your Mentora account from a new device. If this was you, no action is needed. If not, change your password immediately.
warning: If you did not log in, change your password immediately and contact support.
footerNote: If this was you, you can safely ignore this email.
plainTextBody: A new device logged into your Mentora account from {{ipAddress}}.
